text: Before we begin the strategic review, I would like to present an alternative investment opportunity.
Paris, with respect, the agenda has the strategic technology review first. Let us follow the order.
Thank you, Professor Lawrence. Good morning, board members. Today Romeo and I want to show you something unprecedented.
The Verona Platform is a unified API gateway that combines Montague Tech mesh routing with Capulet Industries schema translation.
Let me show you a live demo. This is processing ten thousand requests per second with sub-millisecond latency.
I have to admit, the technical execution is impressive. We have been trying to build mesh routing internally for months.
But my proposal offers guaranteed VC funding of fifty million dollars. Can your platform match that?
Our revenue projections show fifteen million in organic revenue by year three. No dilution, no outside control.
Board members, the question is not just about money. It is about whether two great companies can build something greater together.
